phrases.english: I want to learn Arabic because it's a beautiful language.
phrases.arabic: أريد أن أتعلم اللغة العربية لأنها لغة جميلة.
phrases.pronunciation: Ureed an ata'allam al-lughah al-'arabiyyah li'annaha lughah jameelah.
phrases.context: Expressing your motivation for studying Arabic.

phrases.english: I am practicing speaking Arabic every day.
phrases.arabic: أنا أتدرب على التحدث باللغة العربية كل يوم.
phrases.pronunciation: Ana atadarrab 'ala al-tahadduth bil-lughah al-'arabiyyah kull yawm.
phrases.context: Describing your commitment to improving your Arabic speaking skills.

phrases.english: This book is very helpful for my Arabic studies.
phrases.arabic: هذا الكتاب مفيد جداً لدراستي العربية.
phrases.pronunciation: Hatha al-kitab mufeed jiddan li-dirasati al-'arabiyyah.
phrases.context: Recommending a resource or acknowledging its usefulness in your learning journey.

phrases.english: I hope to become fluent in Arabic soon.
phrases.arabic: آمل أن أتقن اللغة العربية قريباً.
phrases.pronunciation: A'mal an utqin al-lughah al-'arabiyyah qareeban.
phrases.context: Sharing your future goals and aspirations for learning Arabic.

phrases.english: Learning Arabic opens up new cultural experiences for me.
phrases.arabic: تعلم اللغة العربية يفتح لي تجارب ثقافية جديدة.
phrases.pronunciation: Ta'allum al-lughah al-'arabiyyah yaftah li tajareeb thaqafiyyah jadeedah.
phrases.context: Highlighting the broader benefits and opportunities that come with learning Arabic.
